mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS today, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS month FROM ${tableName} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%u')
DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m')
DATE(create_time)
AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ${tableName} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND del_flag = 0 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY label ORDER BY label ASC

SELECT COALESCE(result, flow_status, 'UNKNOWN') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ai_business_flow_instance_link WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND object_code = #{objectCode} GROUP BY COALESCE(result, flow_status, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY value DESC
